text: Okay.

- Ice? - Ice.
- Is the pink sparkling? - No.

Don't you guys get it?
You guys are just pushing me away.
Even if my relationship with robert was abusive, which it is not, your interference and your disapproval is just making you the enemy of my relationship.
So what are we supposed to do? Just sit here and watch you being an abusive relationship with a homicidal ventral spirit and having a child's toy?
It's my decision to make! You guys.
You can't help someone who doesn't want to be helped.
That is the sad truth in the nature of abusive relationships.
You can have a conversation with me, you can point out unhealthy behaviors that you witness.
You can give me options and solutions and you can definitely keep an eye out for physical violence.
But as much as it hurts you to watch someone you love go through a terrible situation, it's still their decision to make.
- We're sorry. - I'm sorry.
Thank you, honey.
I think we just made it worse.
